extraction.one_line_summary: SOLER attacked solo on final circuit lap descent/technical section, held 26-38 seconds through to win ahead of CORT and SAGAN
tactical_patterns: SOLER timed attack on technical descent after KÜNG's climb failure, exploiting Movistar isolation without chase coordination behind.
BISSEGGER cracked on early climb when KÜNG attacked, revealing TT specialists' vulnerability before decisive loop circuits began.
Breakaway groups neutralized before final 34.5km circuit loop, signaling peloton control until late-race positioning became critical.

rider_signals.SOLER Marc: positive: solo descent attack on wet technical section with 26-38s gap shows confidence in bike handling that overwhelmed chasers
rider_signals.KÜNG Stefan: negative: failed early climb attack then dropped back into peloton before decisive move, wasted energy in wrong phase
rider_signals.BISSEGGER Stefan: negative: cracked immediately when KÜNG accelerated on early climb, showed insufficient climbing form for hilly stage circuits
rider_signals.GOOSSENS Kobe: neutral: stayed with KÜNG briefly on early attack but lacked finishing power to sustain breakaway effort
rider_signals.CORT Magnus: positive: second place finish despite wet conditions suggests strong late-race positioning on technical circuits
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: positive: podium finish on wet technical circuit shows maintained bike handling skills translate to non-sprint stages
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: positive: fourth place at 14s shows GC awareness and ability to follow decisive moves on circuits
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: finished at 14s in GC group, maintaining contact but not animating race on wet technical day
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: neutral: same time as THOMAS at 14s, conservative riding in wet conditions to preserve GC position
rider_signals.HIRSCHI Marc: neutral: finished at 24s within top-10 blanket, positioned defensively rather than attacking on home roads
